title: Critics: Circle Failed to Block Drift Hack Transfer
message_html: Critics: Circle Failed to Block Drift Hack Transfer ...
snippet: Stablecoin issuer Circle is under fire from critics who say the company could have moved faster to freeze funds that were stolen from crypto protocol Drift, CoinDesk reported Friday (April 3). During the Drift hack, the attacker used Circle’s cross-chain transfer protocol to move about $232 million
